sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 35:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 35:1
items.html: Because the phase of extension from the coarseness of phase four is missing there. Because of that lack, Malchut cannot expand from her and within her to ten Sefirot of the Guf to Malchut of Malchut, called Tabur. (Item 10, and Inner Light there)
